category_sources: source_facts.description says StackQL is a SQL interface for arbitrary resources with CRUD support; official docs describe querying and mutating cloud control planes and data planes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stackql; official site and docs use the product name StackQL.
docs_sources: Official StackQL documentation is hosted under stackql.io/docs with installation and usage pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set, so repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official StackQL docs describe SQL semantics for cloud infrastructure, IaC, automation, and CRUD-like control-plane/data-plane operations.
